bank.retain_mission: Extract project plans, milestones, dependencies, risks, decisions, and outcomes. Capture how Jira/PM workflows are structured, how studios run sprints, and how experiments are tracked.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about teams, tooling (Jira, etc.), cadences, definitions of done, escalation paths, and recurring risk patterns. Ignore one-off ticket churn.

mental_models.name: Delivery Cadence
mental_models.source_query: How does the team plan and ship work? Sprint length, ceremonies, definition of done, branching, and release cadence.

mental_models.name: Risks & Dependencies
mental_models.source_query: What risks, blockers, and cross-team dependencies recur? Include mitigation patterns that have actually worked.
